You received 100% credit on a $50,000.00 placement. Your credited base was $50,000.00. A desk cost of $5,000.00 was deducted, leaving a commissionable base of $45,000.00. Your base rate is 20%, producing $9,000.00 gross commission. Your net payable is $9,000.00. This calculation is based on plan version plan-v3-fixture and placement placement-3-fixture.
